prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: "I'm compelled to share my thoughts on the product 'Waking Up' by Amazon ( môkhông listed). Initial operation was successful, although somewhat unremarkable. The transition from a state of suspended animation to conscious awareness was disappointingly predictable. The silent, gradual increase in luminescence through my closed eyelids was adequate, but not exceeding. Upon opening my eyes, I was greeted by an ordinary, well-lit room, lacking any notable features or surprises. Overall, the experience was in line with expectations, but failed to leave a lasting impression. 3/5 stars, would not repurchase."
